subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above all the utterances of the world, befitteth and beseemeth the Ancient King, through Whose will creation was brought into being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد منزه از اذکار عالم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که باراده اش خلق موجود و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
